channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: Mbappé critical of tactics in loss by 'sloppy' Fra...
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Kylian Mbappé seemed to question Didier Deschamps' approach and tactics after France's 2-0 defeat to Spain in the FIFA World Cup semifinal on Tuesday.

item.title: Spain end France's bid for 3rd-straight WC final
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Spain beat France 2-0 in their FIFA World Cup semifinal in Arlington, Texas, on Tuesday to make it three wins in a row against their European heavyweight rival.

item.title: Spain 'feeling unbeatable' heading into WC final
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Luis de la Fuente said Spain are "feeling unbeatable" after reaching the World Cup final with a 2-0 win over France.

item.title: Matt Freese: USMNT criticism 'hurts my heart'
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: USMNT goalkeeper Matt Freese said he felt hurt by the backlash following the elimination from the 2026 World Cup after losing 4-1 to Belgium in the round of 16.

item.title: Lewa on Fire: No Euro club would do after Barça
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: New Chicago Fire signing Robert Lewandowski said he couldn't imagine playing for another European club after his four-season stint with Barcelona, and that explains in part his decision to move to MLS.

item.title: Man United sign Villa's Tielemans in $47M deal
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Manchester United have announced the signing of midfielder Youri Tielemans from Aston Villa.

item.title: New Napoli coach Allegri regrets collapse at Milan...
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Massimiliano Allegri is not looking for redemption at Napoli despite still being troubled by the end of his second spell in charge of AC Milan.

item.title: 🥤 Why hydration breaks could be here to stay
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: FIFA's mandated three-minute breaks have been a talking point throughout the 2026 World Cup.

item.title: Balogun: Red card 'controversy' affected USMNT
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: United States striker Folarin Balogun revealed that he predicted President Donald Trump's involvement in overturning his World Cup suspension would "cause a lot of controversy."

item.title: 2027 race: INEC recognises Atiku, 470 ADC candidates
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
INEC confirms recognition of Senator David Mark-led ADC faction, granting access for 471 candidates in the 2027 general election, including Atiku.
Read More: https://punchng.com/2027-race-inec-recognises-atiku-470-adc-candidates/

item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
The NCC is consulting stakeholders on a framework to provide Nigerian students with free educational internet access, aiming to reduce digital learning bar

Cross River APC chairman, Christopher Etta, assures aggrieved members of ongoing reconciliation efforts to strengthen party cohesion after recent congresse

item.title: Reps dump own state police bill, adopt Tinubu’s version
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
The House of Representatives has withdrawn its State Police Bill, opting to adopt President Tinubu’s more robust version for constitutional amendment. Lear
Read More: https://punchng.com/reps-dump-own-state-police-bill-adopt-tinubus-version/

item.title: 2027: APC confident of victory, opposition divided over strategy
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
As the 2027 election approaches, the APC expresses confidence in victory while opposition parties remain divided on strategy. Will a united front emerge?
Read More: https://punchng.com/2027-apc-confident-of-victory-opposition-divided-over-strategy/

item.title: Tears, joy as abducted Oyo pupils reunite with parents
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Emotional reunion in Oyo as abducted pupils and teachers return home after 56 days. Parents express joy and gratitude for the safe return of their children
Read More: https://punchng.com/tears-joy-as-abducted-oyo-pupils-reunite-with-parents/

item.title: Ogun lawmaker salutes Osoba’s legacy at 87
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
An Ogun lawmaker celebrates former Governor Olusegun Osoba’s 87th birthday, highlighting his enduring legacy in journalism and politics.
Read More: https://punchng.com/ogun-lawmaker-salutes-osobas-legacy-at-87/

item.title: Tuchel: Argentina and Messi will bring best out of England
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Thomas Tuchel believes the challenge of Argentina and Lionel Messi will bring the best out of his England side.

item.title: Trial of BFI Group, 7 others for alleged €100m fraud stalled
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: EFCC, is prosecuting the company alongside Reuben M. Jaja, Ozor Chidi Jerry, David Femi James, Imeobong Jumbo Udom, Adeolu Edward, Emeka Emmanuel Okorie, Johnson Gabriel (now at large) on amended five-count charges to the tune of €100 million (One Hundred Million Euros).

item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: The Zamfara State Hospital Service Management Board (HSMB) successfully conducted a Computer-Based Test (CBT) for applicants seeking employment as Nurses and Midwives in the state healthcare system. The exercise was organised as part of the board’s commitment to ensuring a transparent, credibl

item.title: Celebrations over CTJ’s killing of bandit leader Sani Yellow in Zamfara
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: Citizens are celebrating the killing of a notorious bandit kingpin, Kachalla Sani Yellow, by a combined team of Civilian Joint Task Force, known as Askarawan Zamfara, and hunters in Zamfara State. The bandit warlord was killed in Anka Local Government Area of the State during an exchange of fire whi

item.title: Spain show teamwork may win out in 'World Cup of superstars'
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: France's attacking firepower was the focus of the build-up to their World Cup semi-final against Spain. If it wasn't Kylian Mbappe who did the damage, it would surely be Ousmane Dembele. Or Michael Olise. Or Bradley Barcola. Or Desire Doue.

item.title: ‘$200 million Zamfara Lithium Processing Plant to generate 2,000 jobs’
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: Governor Dauda Lawal unveiled a $200 million lithium mining and processing plant, saying it will create 2,000 jobs for the citizens in the state. The mining plant was established in Boko, Zurmi Local Government Area of the state, and was commissioned by the governor at the weekend. He described the

item.title: Zamfara gov’t targets industrial boom with solid minerals, SME support
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: The Federal Government says it is addressing possible bottlenecks to attract global trade and investment into Zamfara’s mining and trade sectors. The Minister of Industry, Trade and Investment, Dr Jumoke Oduwole, stated this during a visit to Governor Dauda Lawal in Gusau, Zamfara, on Monday. The mi

item.title: Your vote is your voice, Issa-Onilu tells Osun electorate at NOA town hall with stakeholders
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: “Every eligible voter in Osun State must understand that voting is not merely a political activity. It is a civic duty and a patriotic responsibility. The future of our communities, our state and our democracy depends on the choices we make at the polls."

item.title: 'Extremely happy' Deschamps gets the farewell game no-one wants
item.dc:creator: BBC Sport Football
item.description: Didier Deschamps' long, storied career with France will come to an end not how he would have wanted it - in Saturday's World Cup third-place play-off.

But they met their match in the semi-finals when faced with slick European champions Spain, who outplayed and outsmarted Les Bleus to deny them a third co

item.dc:creator: Leadership

item.title: WHO launches first trial of antiviral to prevent Bundibugyo strain of Ebola

item.description: The World Health Organization launched the first clinical trial on Tuesday to test whether an antiviral drug can prevent infection in people exposed to the Bundibugyo strain of Ebola in the Democratic Republic of Congo, as the outbreak continues to outpace response efforts and spread beyond known ch

item.title: World Cup 2026: Deschamps Laments ‘Poor Officiating’ In France Defeat To Spain
item.dc:creator: Completesports
item.description: France coach Didier Deschamps questioned the officiating following France’s 2-0 World Cup semi-final defeat to Spain on Tuesday. While he admitted that his team was technically inferior and outplayed, Deschamps berated referee Iván Barton, asking reporters, “Is the referee at the level r

item.title: Nothing’s good-looking Watch 3 Pro smartwatch is just $69
item.dc:creator: The Verge
item.description: While most fitness trackers are losing the screens to keep the price low, the CMF by Nothing Watch 3 Pro is a bit different. The budget-friendly smartwatch with a 1.43-inch OLED display is even cheaper than usual at Amazon, where it costs $69 in every color (the price fluctuates between $79 and $99)

item.title: Sanwo-Olu urges Lagos residents to plant trees, says state targets 20,000 this year
item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: Governor Sanwo-Olu reminded residents that anyone who unlawfully fells a tree is required under Lagos State law to replace it with five others. The post Sanwo-Olu urges Lagos residents to plant trees, says state targets 20,000 this year appeared first on Premium Times Nigeria.

item.title: OpenAI’s first hardware device is reportedly a screenless speaker that can move
item.dc:creator: TechCrunch
item.description: The device is weirdly described as involving "mechanical elements that can move on their own" and the Bloomberg report includes the detail that the device is designed to "feel like a companion and become a physical manifestation of OpenAI’s ChatGPT."

item.description: Nigeria and the United States have reaffirmed their commitment to expanding defence cooperation as both countries intensify efforts to combat terrorism, violent extremism and other evolving security threats across West Africa and the continent. The renewed commitment was highlighted during a courtes

item.description: “I’ve always been a little skeptical of the government’s encouragement to delay claiming benefits.”

item.title: Climate tech overtakes fintech as Africa’s top venture funding sector – Report
item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: Climate tech’s part in the venture funding became dramatically pronounced in 2025, when it alone contributed 40 per cent or $1.5 billion, compared to other years in the near-decade period under review, the study said. That was up from 13 per cent or $206 million in 2016. The post Climate tech overta

item.title: Actress Omotunde Ogundimu reveals battle with cervical cancer, solicits financial help
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Veteran Nollywood actress, Omotunde Ogundimu, has cried out over her battle with cervical cancer. The actress made the revelation on Tuesday during an interview with her colleague, Biola Adebayo, on the Talk to B podcast. Speaking about her secret battle with cancer since 2025, the actress

item.title: itel Debuts First Air Conditioner in Nigeria, Records Sells Out Within 8 Hours
item.dc:creator: BusinessDay
item.description: itel, a reliable global brand recognized for delivering budget-friendly, high-quality smart life consumer electronics, has officially made a historic entry read more itel Debuts First Air Conditioner in Nigeria, Records Sells Out Within 8 Hours

item.title: Spain deliver masterclass to beat France 2-0 and reach World Cup final
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: European champions Spain beat France with controlled display to book final against Argentina or England.

item.title: Three powerful forces are draining family wealth — and your estate plan is completely unprepared
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: From Medicaid cuts to an IRA tax trap, here are the real threats to your family’s inheritance and what to do about them.

item.title: Spain into World Cup final after victory over France
item.dc:creator: BBC Sport Football
item.description: Spain are into the 2026 World Cup final after goals from Mikel Oyarzabal and Pedro Porro see them convincingly beat France 2-0 in their semi-final in Dallas.

item.title: Senate honours fallen security personnel in Oyo rescue mission, seeks full benefits for families
item.dc:creator: Ripples Nigeria
item.description: The Senate on Tuesday identified three security operatives who lost their lives and another who sustained injuries during the military operation that secured the release of abducted pupils and teachers in Oriire Local Government Area of Oyo State after 56 days in captivity. The upper legislative cha

item.title: Windows 11’s big patch Tuesday allows you to hold off on updates for longer
item.dc:creator: The Verge
item.description: Microsoft just released a long list of improvements for Windows 11 as part of its bigger patch Tuesdays, and that includes the ability to pause updates indefinitely, as reported earlier by Windows Central. This option rolled out to Windows Insiders earlier this year, allowing you to hold off on upda
